/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libkcm_samba_static.a CMakeFiles/kcm_samba_static.dir/kcm_samba_static_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kcm_samba_static.dir/smbmountmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kcm_samba_static.dir/ksambasharemodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kcm_samba_static.dir/org.freedesktop.Avahi.Server.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libkcm_samba_static.a
